query:
SELECT p.id, p.totalAmount, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN pay.movementType = 'payment' THEN pay.amount ELSE 0 END) as totalCobrado,
       SUM(CASE WHEN pay.movementType = 'discount' THEN pay.amount ELSE 0 END) as totalDiscounts,
       SUM(CASE WHEN pay.movementType = 'surcharge' THEN pay.amount ELSE 0 END) as totalSurcharges
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN payments pay ON p.id = pay.projectId
WHERE p.id = 2130117
GROUP BY p.id, p.totalAmount

       SUM(CASE WHEN pay.movementType = 'discount' THEN pay.amount ELSE 0 END) as totalDiscounts,
       SUM(CASE WHEN pay.movementType = 'surcharge' THEN pay.amount ELSE 0 END) as totalSurcharges
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN payments pay ON p.id = pay.projectId
WHERE p.id = 2130117
GROUP BY p.id, p.totalAmount
